About Me

Designing with care, building with precision

I'm a detail-oriented and dedicated designer with a Computer Science foundation, driven by a passion for crafting interfaces that are as functional as they are visually refined. My experience spans UI/UX design, frontend development, and full-stack systems work.

What I Do

My Design & Development Services

Crafting visually engaging interfaces and reliable systems that are both intuitive and user-centered.

UI/UX Design

User-centered interfaces built around real workflows — wireframes, flows, and polished visual design.

Frontend Development

Clean, responsive interfaces built with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React Native.

Database Systems

Structured, queryable systems built with MySQL — replacing manual records with reliable data flows.

Web Design

Full site design and build — from layout and typography to launch-ready, polished pages.
